mapper.insert:
SELECT get_mdl_seq2(#{coId}, 'ROLE', 6)
INSERT INTO ADM_ROLE ( CO_ID, ROLE_ID, ROLE_CD, ROLE_NM, ROLE_DESC, USE_FLG, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{roleId}, #{roleCd}, #{roleNm}, #{roleDesc}, COALESCE(#{useFlg}, 'Y'), #{creUsrId}, #{creUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO ADM_ROLE_AUTH ( CO_ID, ROLE_ID, PGM_ID, PERM_ID, USE_FLG, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{roleId}, #{pgmId}, #{permId}, COALESCE(#{useFlg}, 'Y'), #{creUsrId}, #{creUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ADM_ROLE SET ROLE_CD = #{roleCd}, ROLE_NM = #{roleNm}, ROLE_DESC = #{roleDesc}, USE_FLG = #{useFlg}, UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND ROLE_ID = #{roleId}

INSERT INTO ADM_ROLE_AUTH ( CO_ID, ROLE_ID, PGM_ID, PERM_ID, USE_FLG, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{roleId}, #{pgmId}, #{permId}, COALESCE(#{activeYn}, 'Y'), #{updUsrId}, #{updUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (CO_ID, ROLE_ID, PGM_ID, PERM_ID) DO UPDATE SET USE_FLG = #{activeYn}, UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = NOW()
